name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl and Sopi operator backend v5.77: machine summary now includes model, isKioskModel and isFridge. These were stored and persisted correctly but never returned by the machines list endpoint, so a fridge was indistinguishable from a coil machine in the dashboard and model changes could not be verified. Purely additive to the summary output. Cumulative over v5.76.
